common.appTitle: ดึ๋งปุ๊ Idle Game
common.appDescription: A solo-character idle MMORPG-lite — level up, allocate stats, cast skills, challenge bosses, and change classes to keep growing stronger.

hud.botMasterAriaOn: Turn the bot off (disables all automation)
hud.botMasterAriaOff: Turn the bot on (enables all automation)
hud.botMasterHint: One switch for all automation: hunting, casting skills, stat points, potions, town trips, advancing zones — turn it off anytime to play manually; manual play (tap to move/attack) always works.

ladder.hallOfFameHint: View the Hall of Fame leaderboard

levelUp.progress: Lv.{level} → Lv.{gate} unlocks the class-change quest

classQuest.readyHint: Quest complete! Tap below to change class.

zoneBoss.farmingHint: Kill enemies to unlock the next zone
zoneBoss.readyHint: The boss-room door is open — walk in and challenge it!
zoneBoss.townHint: Resting in town - head out to hunt toward the next unlock
zoneBoss.freeFarmHint: This zone is already cleared - free-farm for loot and levels
zoneBoss.victoryHint: Walk into the next map to keep growing stronger.

panels.skillAriaLabel: {heroName}: {skillName}{status, select, dead { (dead)} cooldown { (cooldown {seconds}s)} nomana { (no mana)} other {}}
panels.autoSlotToggleHint: Toggle this skill into a free auto-cast slot

classQuest.ariaChange: {heroName}: change class{state, select, confirm { (tap again to confirm)} other {}}
classQuest.guideKillAny: Keep hunting in your current zone — it counts anywhere
classQuest.guideKillGatedTier3: 🔒 Climb map 3 to the boss gate first — the tundra will open up to raid
classQuest.guideBossBacktrack: Walk back to the {map} boss room — the boss respawns for a re-fight
classQuest.guideBossAny: Beat the boss of the map you're currently farming
classQuest.guideBossTier3Hint: You've reached the frontier — hit the challenge button when you're ready
classQuest.rewardLine: Reward: become {cls} · a big power jump + a new skill
classQuest.rewardLineTier3: Reward: become {cls} · a big power jump + a new skill + 4th skill + 4th auto-cast slot
classQuest.ariaGuide: {heroName}: guide me to the next quest objective

disabled.dead: Your hero is down — try again after reviving
disabled.channeling: Warping in progress — wait a moment
disabled.traveling: Already traveling — wait until you arrive

stats.title: Stats
stats.pointsTitle: Unspent stat points — tap + to allocate
stats.autoBlockedHint: Turn off Auto Stat to allocate manually

botModal.title: Bot settings
botModal.masterOffHint: The bot switch is off — you can still adjust these settings, but they won't run until you turn the bot switch back on.
botModal.combatGroupHint: Let the hero cast skills and allocate stat points on its own.
botModal.potionGroupHint: Auto-use HP/mana potions once a pool drops below its threshold.
botModal.townGroupHint: The bot warps to town to buy potions / sell / equip its best gear on its own.
botModal.dropGroupHint: Rules for what the bot sells/keeps per drop rarity on its town trips.
botModal.walkGroupHint: Behavior after your hero dies, and auto-advancing to the next zone.
botModal.autoReturnHint: After your hero respawns in town, walk back to farming automatically.
botModal.autoAdvanceHint: Once a zone's quota is cleared, walk into the next unlocked zone automatically (never a boss room).

bot.title: Helper bots
bot.hint: The bot warps to town on its own when your bags fill up or potions run low, then walks back to farming automatically.
bot.goldReserveHint: The bot will always leave at least this much gold (not a spending budget)
bot.restockHint: Warps to town on its own once HP/mana potions run out, then buys back up to target.
bot.sellTripHint: Warps to town on its own once the bag is full, then sells per the drop rules.
bot.masterOffDisabledHint: Turn the main bot switch on first to enable this.

autoSell.title: Auto-dispose drops
autoSell.epicHint: Epic protection is always forced on: the bot can only sell an epic that's worse than what's equipped and isn't the best piece for an empty slot — even with "Protect good gear" off
autoSell.keepBetterStat: Protect good gear (upgrades over equipped + best piece for an empty slot)

welcome.title: Welcome, {className}!
welcome.body: Your character just picked the {className} class. It hunts the mobs scattered across the field automatically — your job is to spend stat points, cast skills, and take it to the boss to keep growing stronger. Let's take a look!

watchFight.title: Let your hero fight
watchFight.body: Your hero attacks enemies on its own. Every kill banks gold, and the bar below fills up toward the boss.

allocateStats.title: Spend stat points on level-up
allocateStats.body: Every level-up grants 3 stat points to allocate yourself (STR/DEX/INT/VIT). Tap the + button on a stat here to spend one, or flip on "Auto Stat" to let the system allocate for you.

castSkill.title: Cast a skill yourself
castSkill.body: Each skill costs mana plus a cooldown. Tap a skill button once you have enough mana and its cooldown is up for a big burst of damage!

slotAutoSkill.title: Slot a skill into auto-cast
slotAutoSkill.body: Tap the "+ Auto" badge under a skill to drop it into an auto-cast slot (3 unlock by level, a 4th opens at Class Tier 3). Skills outside a slot still need a manual tap.

botSwitchIntro.title: This is the bot switch
botSwitchIntro.body: This is the bot switch — you can turn it off if you want to play manually. Turning it off stops ALL automation (skills, stats, potions, town trips, advancing zones); manual play (tap to move/attack) always keeps working. Tap ⚙ next to it to fine-tune each behavior.

bossChallenge.title: Challenge the map boss
bossChallenge.body: Fill each zone's hunt quota to unlock the next zone. At the last zone the boss-room door opens — walk in to duel the boss and unlock the next map!

settingsTour.title: Tune your play here
settingsTour.body: Tap "⚙ Settings" to mute/unmute sound or switch languages, and tap "📖 Guide" to reopen the game guide anytime from this row. All automation now lives under the 🤖 Bot switch up top instead.

outro.title: You're ready!
outro.body: That's the whole core loop: kill → bank XP/gold → spend stats & skills → challenge the boss → grow stronger, on repeat. Enjoy the adventure!

heroDeathRespawn.title: Don't worry when a hero goes down!
heroDeathRespawn.body: A downed hero auto-revives after a short timer — no button to tap, just wait for them to get back up and keep fighting.

autoCastAvailable.title: Try auto-cast for your skills
autoCastAvailable.body: A skill is ready. Slot it into an auto-cast slot (tap "+ Auto") and flip on "Auto Skill" — your hero will cast slotted skills automatically the instant they're ready.

questOffered.title: Class-change quest available!
questOffered.body: Your hero hit the level gate for the class-change quest. Tap "Accept quest" in the quest card above to start it.

questComplete.title: Quest complete!
questComplete.body: Objectives done. Tap "Change class!" in the quest card (tap again to confirm) to advance to the next class tier with a new skill.

autoSlotUnlocked.title: New auto-cast slot unlocked!
autoSlotUnlocked.body: Your hero unlocked another auto-cast slot. Tap "+ Auto" under a skill to fill the new slot.

statPointsPiling.title: Stat points are piling up
statPointsPiling.body: You've got several unspent stat points saved up. Tap + to allocate them, or flip on "Auto Stat" to let the system spend them for you.

stageClear.title: Boss down! Stage cleared.
stageClear.body: Tap "Next stage" to push into a tougher stage and keep leveling up.

bossWipe.title: Your hero got wiped — but it's not over!
bossWipe.body: Your hero revives in town with no penalty and goes back to hunting. Spend a few more stat points or grind a bit more, then challenge the boss again.

manualPlayHint.title: You can play manually now!
manualPlayHint.body: Tap the ground to walk, tap a monster to attack. Tap "✕ Cancel Command" to stop, or flip the 🤖 Bot switch back on to let your hero hunt on its own again.

tier3QuestOffered.title: Tier-3 class quest available!
tier3QuestOffered.body: Your evolved hero hit the level gate for its final class-change quest. Tap "Accept quest" in the quest card above to start it.

skill4Unlocked.title: 4th skill slot unlocked!
skill4Unlocked.body: Class Tier 3 opened a new auto-cast slot for your ultimate skill. Tap "+ Auto" under it to fill the new slot.

townNpcTapHint.title: Tap an NPC to talk
townNpcTapHint.body: Tap an NPC to walk over and talk — buying/refining happens right there with them now. First tap walks over, tap again once you arrive to open the shop/refine station.

questBoardHint.title: The village elder has quests!
questBoardHint.body: Tap the elder in town to open the Quest Board — a story-driven main quest and 3 daily quests to do each day (miss a day, lose nothing).

coreLoop.title: Kill → bank XP/gold → grow stronger → boss
coreLoop.body: Your hero hunts the scattered field mobs on its own, all the time. Every kill banks XP (level-ups + stat points) and gold, and pushes the hunt tally toward the next zone unlock. Cast skills to speed things up and walk the world as you grow.

characterSlots.title: Characters & 3 slots
characterSlots.body: Each account can create up to 3 characters, each locked to a starting class (Sword/Bow/Magic) chosen at creation. Switch between them anytime from the characters page (the "Switch character" button in the settings row).

baseStats.title: Base stats (STR/DEX/INT/VIT)
baseStats.body: Every level-up grants 3 stat points to spend yourself — STR boosts melee attack, DEX boosts ranged attack + attack speed, INT boosts magic attack and mana, VIT boosts max HP. Turn on "Auto Stat" to let the system allocate for you. There's no gold-bought upgrade line anymore — a hero's power comes purely from level + stats + class/skills.

manaSkills.title: Mana, skills & auto slots
manaSkills.body: Skills cost mana (fed by INT) plus a cooldown. Each class tier learns 2-3 skills, unlocked by level. Tap a skill to cast it yourself, or drop it into an auto-cast slot with "+ Auto" (3 slots unlock at Lv 1/15/30, a 4th opens at Class Tier 3) — skills left outside a slot still need a manual tap.

classQuest.title: Class-change quest
classQuest.body: At Lv.15 the game auto-offers a class-change quest — accept it, then defeat 60 enemies and 1 boss. Once complete, tap "Change class!" (tap again to confirm) to advance to the next class tier with a new skill and a permanent power boost.

hero-swordsman.body: The Swordsman is your melee frontliner — auto-attacks whatever's directly in front, and learns more special skills as it levels, usable once cooldown and mana are ready (tap the skill button on the skill bar, or slot it into auto-cast).

hero-archer.body: The Archer attacks at range with arrows — fast and precise — and learns more special skills as it levels, usable once cooldown and mana are ready (tap the skill button on the skill bar, or slot it into auto-cast).

hero-mage.body: The Mage deals area-of-effect magic damage, great against grouped-up enemies, and learns more special skills as it levels, usable once cooldown and mana are ready (tap the skill button on the skill bar, or slot it into auto-cast).

boss.title: Challenging the map boss
boss.body: The goal card under the arena shows a bar comparing your power to the recommendation. Fill every zone's hunt quota and the boss-room door at the end of the map opens — walk in to duel. If your hero dies the boss retreats, you revive in town with no penalty, hunting resumes, and you can walk right back in. Winning pays a big gold reward and unlocks the next map.

autoCast.title: ✨ Auto Skill
autoCast.body: When on, your hero automatically casts whatever skills are slotted into its auto-cast slots the instant cooldown and mana are ready. 3 slots unlock by level (Lv 1/15/30), and a 4th opens at Class Tier 3 — no need to tap the skill buttons yourself.

autoAllocate.title: 🎯 Auto Stat
autoAllocate.body: When on, the system spends stat points from level-ups for you automatically (favoring your class's main stat) — no need to tap + yourself.

offlineIdle.title: Offline gold
offlineIdle.body: Close the game and come back later — it automatically calculates the progress you would have made while away (capped at 8 hours per session) and hands you the banked gold as soon as you return.

gear.title: Drops & Gear
gear.body: Enemies and bosses have a chance to drop weapons/armor to collect. Each item has a tier and rarity (common/rare/epic). Open your Inventory (🎒) to equip one weapon + one armor — some pieces require a matching class. Monsters also drop Enhancement Stones — collect them to power up your gear at Uncle Dueng's refine station in town.

worldMaps.title: 6 maps, 30 stages
worldMaps.body: The world spans 6 maps (Human World -> Demon Realm -> Wild Frontier -> Frozen Tundra -> Desert Ruins -> Infernal City), each with 5 farm zones + a boss room. Clear a map's boss to unlock the next one; maps 4-6 (Grand Expansion) open once your hero reaches Class Tier 3.

classTier3.title: Tier-3 class change (Grand Expansion)
classTier3.body: At Lv.40 a second class-change quest unlocks: the gate to the Frozen Tundra frontier (map 4, first zone) opens early — hunt 90 monsters there. Once you're done, the boss-room gate opens — walk in and defeat the young Glacial Sovereign, a weakened taste of the real stage-20 fight. Completing it advances your hero to its final class tier — a huge power spike, a 4th skill, and a 4th auto-cast slot — then come back and smash the stage-15 boss.

questBoard.title: Main quest, dailies, and the Quest Board
questBoard.body: The village elder (the town's 3rd NPC) opens the Quest Board: a main quest line, one chapter per map (beat that map's boss to finish the chapter — gold/materials/potions, never gear), plus 3 daily quests each day (kill/refine/buy potions/spend gold/beat any boss — miss a day, lose nothing; resets on the server clock). Rewards are claimed at the Quest Board only. A "!" badge over the elder's head means something's ready to claim. You can also buy a Warp Scroll from Auntie Pu to teleport to a party member standing in a zone you've already climbed to yourself.

boss-map4.title: Glacial Sovereign (stage 20) — Charge
boss-map4.body: The frozen tundra's boss telegraphs a dash toward your position, then rushes in for a heavy hit — watch the telegraph and be ready to take the charge or reposition.

boss-map5.title: Buried Pharaoh (stage 25) — Summon
boss-map5.body: As its HP drops, the desert ruins' boss summons adds in bursts to fight alongside it — clear the summons quickly so they don't pile up.

boss-map6.title: Infernal Sovereign (stage 30) — Field Hazard
boss-map6.body: The hell city's boss unleashes a telegraphed arena-wide hazard strike that damages you no matter where you stand — heal up and out-DPS it before the strike lands.

swordsman.name: Whirl Slash
swordsman.desc: Spins the blade to hit every foe in range

archer.name: Arrow Rain
archer.desc: Rains arrows across the whole battlefield

mage.name: Meteor
mage.desc: Calls down a meteor strike on the area

sword_whirl.name: Whirl Slash
sword_whirl.desc: Spins the blade to hit every foe in range

sword_warcry.name: War Cry
sword_warcry.desc: A rallying shout that boosts your attack for a while

sword_quake.name: Earthquake
sword_quake.desc: Slams the ground for heavy area damage ahead

archer_rain.name: Arrow Rain
archer_rain.desc: Rains arrows across the whole battlefield

archer_powershot.name: Power Shot
archer_powershot.desc: A single devastating arrow — the boss-buster

archer_barrage.name: Explosive Shot
archer_barrage.desc: An explosive arrow that bursts over a cluster

mage_meteor.name: Meteor
mage_meteor.desc: Calls down a meteor strike on the area

mage_frostnova.name: Frost Nova
mage_frostnova.desc: A quick, cheap frost blast for clearing packs

mage_cataclysm.name: Cataclysm
mage_cataclysm.desc: A colossal meteor — the ultimate burst

sword_skyfall.name: Skyfall Strike
sword_skyfall.desc: Freezes time for an instant, then crashes down with an earth-shattering strike across the field

archer_storm.name: Arrow Storm
archer_storm.desc: A relentless storm of arrows rains across the whole field for several seconds

mage_apocalypse.name: Apocalypse
mage_apocalypse.desc: Darkens the sky and calls down a volley of meteors — the end of the world

warpScroll.name: Friend Warp Scroll
warpScroll.desc: Warp to a zone you've already unlocked — handy for catching up with your party

characters.pageSubtitle: Pick a character to play, or create a new one (up to 3 per account)
characters.emptyBody: Create your first character to start the adventure!

card.selectError: Couldn't select this character — try again

delete.title: Delete "{name}"?
delete.warning: This cannot be undone — the character and all its progress will be permanently lost.

create.title: Create a New Character

swordsman.playstyle: Wades into melee range with a blade — tough and hard-hitting.

archer.playstyle: Fires arrows from range — fast and precise.

mage.playstyle: Casts spells that shred grouped-up enemies.

create.nameHint: 2-24 characters, Thai/English letters and digits only (no spaces or symbols)

nameError.tooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters
nameError.tooLong: Name must be at most 24 characters
nameError.invalidChars: Only Thai/English letters and digits are allowed

create.limitError: You already have the maximum of 3 characters
create.duplicateError: That name is already taken — try another
create.genericError: Couldn't create the character — try again

welcome.title: ดึ๋งปุ๊ Idle Game
welcome.subtitle: A solo MMORPG-lite adventure — hunt monsters, level up, and climb the ranks
welcome.guestHint: Jump straight in, no sign-up needed. Progress is saved to this device — you can register later in Settings to unlock friend features (coming soon)
welcome.guestError: Couldn't enter the game — try again

register.displayNameHint: Shown to friends in the friend system (coming soon)

account.logoutWarning: Logging out returns this device to a fresh guest — if you haven't registered yet, your current progress won't follow you
account.guestPitch: You're playing as a guest — register to unlock friend features (coming soon). Your current progress binds to the new account right away, nothing is lost
account.switchAccountHint: Already have an account? You can log in with it instead — but any unregistered progress on this device won't follow unless you register first

world.lockedTooltip: Locked — clear this zone’s quota first
world.frontier: End of the frontier for now

shop.title: Town Shop
shop.subtitle: Stock up before you head out
shop.buybackEmptyHint: Nothing to buy back — sold items stick around here for 3 days
shop.returnScrollAria: Use a Return Scroll to teleport to town ({count} left)

announcements.landedMax: 🔥 {charName} landed a +{level} on {itemName}! The whole server bows down!
announcements.firstToCap: 🏆 {charName} is the first player to reach Lv.{level}!
announcements.rankOne: 👑 {charName} has claimed the #1 Combat Power throne!

notices.botSelling: 💰 Bot is selling at the shop...
notices.botReturning: 🏃 Bot is heading back to the farm...
notices.autoSellNothing: Bag is full but the auto-sell rules matched nothing - adjust them in Settings or sell manually; the sell-trip bot is paused for now
notices.guideBossDoor: 🚪 Walk into the boss-room door on the right to challenge it!
notices.guideBossTier3: You've reached the frontier — hit the challenge button when you're ready
notices.guideGatedTier3Frontier: Taking you to your frontier — keep unlocking zones onward to map 3's boss gate
notices.walkToLungdueng: Walk over to Uncle Dueng first
notices.dailyQuestComplete: 🏘 Daily complete! Go claim it at the village elder

fastTravelBlocked.aggro: A mob is engaged with you — can't warp
fastTravelBlocked.dead: Your hero is down — can't warp

buyback.insufficientGold: Not enough gold to buy that back
buyback.bagFull: Bag's full — can't buy that back

refine.title: Refine Station
refine.emptyHint: Nothing to refine in this slot

band.safe: Safe — nothing is lost on a miss

greetings.greeting2: HP and mana potions in stock, friend!
greetings.greeting3: Come back and shop with me anytime

greetings.greeting2: Bring it here, I'll strike it good and solid
greetings.greeting3: Materials ready — let's get to it

greetings.greeting1: Got a few quests for you — check the board
greetings.greeting2: Three dailies waiting on you today
greetings.greeting3: Safe travels — the village is counting on you

items.refine: ⚒️ Refine (+N gear) is here! Salvage unused gear into materials, then try your luck at the town refine station — +1 to +3 are safe, +4+ can fail and drop a level, +8+ risks shattering!
items.manualPlay: 👆 Manual control is in: tap the ground to move, tap a monster to attack (try turning AUTO off)
items.skills: ✨ Big skills hit even harder — tier-2 ultimates now cover the whole screen! Monster fields are denser, so bring mana potions along
items.bot: 🤖 The bot got smarter: set each rarity to sell for gold or salvage into refine materials (in Settings)
items.autoAllocate: 📊 New auto-allocate: stat points now go where your class actually needs them, no more scattergun spending
items.prestige: 🔥 +8/+9/+10 gear now flaunts an escalating divine aura — hit +10 and the whole field will know it
items.announce: 📣 Land a +8 or higher and the WHOLE server hears about it — get ready to show off!
items.intShare: 🧪 Swordsman/Archer now auto-invest some INT — mana potion burden cut by more than half
items.catchUp: ⏰ Switch tabs or fold your phone as long as you like — the game now catches up all your progress when you return
items.botFix: 🛠 Fixed the bot reaching town but refusing to sell/salvage — every trip now completes its chores
items.kiteFix: 🏹 Archer/Mage now glide smoothly while kiting — no more jittery bouncing
items.statTapFix: 👆 Stat + buttons now register every tap with instant feedback — mash away
items.botTrip: 🏃 The bot works harder: one town trip now clears every chore you enabled — potions, selling, and salvaging in a single visit

items.autoAdvance: 🚶 New! Auto-advance — quota done, walk straight into the next zone (toggle in Settings)
items.classAura: 🔥 Epic weapon auras now match your class — crimson blade / emerald bow / azure staff
items.gaugeFix: 🔓 Zone-unlock gauge no longer resets on warps/town trips/logout — remembered per zone
items.bossGateFix: ⚔ The challenge button only lights up at the real boss door — no more dead glowing button
items.copySweep: 📝 Goal/tutorial copy fully updated to the hunting-field + boss-door model

items.world: 🗺 The world just DOUBLED! 3 new maps — Ice Tundra · Desert Ruins · Hell City (stages 16-30) + level cap raised to 90
items.tier3: 👑 Class tier 3 is here! Grand Knight / Hunt King / Archmage — quest at Lv.40, a power spike that breaks the stage-15 wall
items.skill4: ⚡ A spectacular 4th skill per tier-3 class — Skyfall Blade (time stops!) / Relentless Arrow Storm / Apocalypse
items.slot4: ✨ 4th auto-skill slot unlocks with class tier 3
items.gear: 🛡 Gear tiers 7-10 drop in the new stages — stronger everything, refine to a new ceiling
items.boss: 😈 All 6 bosses now look unique + new bosses fight dirty: charging rush / summoned minions / arena-wide shockwaves — watch the warning signs!
items.codex: 📖 Codex covers the new world, tier-3 classes, and every new boss
items.warpFix: 🌀 Picking a warp zone now closes the window — see your warp instantly
items.modalFix: 📱 Mobile fix: inventory/refine/settings windows no longer get covered by HUD buttons

items.hof: 🏆 The Hall of Fame is OPEN! 5 top-10 boards — level · power · total gold earned · best boss-clear times · online time — filter by class + tap anyone to inspect their gear and auras
items.announce: 📣 Server-wide announcements: first player to Lv.90 and every new power #1 — everyone hears about it
items.quest3: 👑 Tier-3 quest reborn: the tundra frontier gate opens early for you — hunt 90 monsters, then duel the young Glacial Sovereign. No more backtracking
items.questCard: 🧭 New quest card: see every objective, progress bar, and reward up front — accept, change class, and guide-me buttons all in one place
items.botSwitch: 🤖 The bot is now ONE switch! On = plays everything for you, off = pure manual — with all bot settings in a single panel and ⓘ hints everywhere
items.botConfig: 💾 Bot settings now stick to your character — set once, works on every device
items.species: 🐺 12 new monster species across maps 4-6: frost wolves, ice golems, sand scorpions, mummies, imps, charcoal brutes and more
items.warcry: ⚔ War Cry got its due: a crimson battle aura while buffed + an on-screen countdown chip (party-wide once parties arrive)
items.skillInfo: ⓘ Every skill is now inspectable: damage multiplier, radius, mana, cooldown — real numbers
items.travel: 🌀 Redesigned warp menu with themed sections per map — town pinned right at the top
items.inventory: 🎒 Inventory now sorts best-first and shows every item individually — no more stacks
items.refineSmooth: 🔨 Smoother refining: hammer away, tap to skip the reveal, your selection never slips
items.facing: 🏹 Archers/mages stopped spinning when surrounded and now face their target while kiting — looks so much better
items.epicBot: ✨ The bot can manage epic drops now (opt-in) — with an always-on keep-your-good-gear guard

items.npc: 🏘 Town is alive! Pah Pu (potions·sell·salvage) and Uncle Dueng (refining) are real now — tap to walk over, tap again to talk and trade; the bot walks up to them too
items.warpEasy: 🌀 Warping is way easier: channel mid-combat, and taking hits no longer cancels it
items.questClimb: 🧗 Tier-3 quest: climb map 3 to the boss door yourself before the tundra opens — no zone-skipping shortcuts
items.questLead: 🧭 While on a quest, every bot route leads back to the quest zone — Guide Me can't be hijacked anymore
items.freeFarm: 🌾 Farming an old zone on purpose? The bot respects it — no more dragging you forward (it only advances on a fresh unlock)
items.softLockFix: 🔧 Fixed the freeze after defeating the young Glacial Sovereign — you now warp back to the frontier with the change-class button ready
items.updateBanner: 🚀 New patch deployed while you play? The game tells you — one tap saves and updates

items.townWalkFix: 🚶 Town bugfix: tap-to-walk works in town again, and tapping Pah Pu / Uncle Dueng actually walks you over — move orders used to vanish in town, making NPCs untalkable
items.shopSell: 💰 Pah Pu now buys back: sell and salvage gear right from her shop dialog, no need to open the inventory separately

items.buyback: 🔁 Sold something by mistake? Buy it back from Pah Pu within 3 days, at the price you got for it — new "Buy back" tab in her shop

items.account: 👤 Accounts are here! Keep playing as a guest like before, or register later in Settings > My Account — log in and pick up on any device
items.friends: 👥 Friends are here! Tap the 👥 button, add by friend code or character name, see who's online / what they're playing / which zone, and send emoji greetings
items.party: 🎉 Party phase 1: invite up to 3 friends into a party and see teammate status live — playing together for real is coming next
items.quest: 📜 A whole new quest lineup! Story quests by chapter plus 3 dailies a day, claimed at the new village elder NPC in town (miss a day, lose nothing)
items.warpFriend: 🌀 The friend-warp scroll is now on sale at Pah Pu's shop — teleport straight to a party member, limited to zones you've personally reached
items.materials: 💎 Enhancement stones now drop straight from monsters — no more salvaging. Anything you already stockpiled stays put; the salvage tab is gone and the bot only sells for gold now
items.manaCut: 🧪 Sword and bow mana burn cut nearly in half — go longer before running dry
items.llama: 🦙 A new friend (with more on the way) has wandered into town — go tap it

items.partyLive: 🤝 Party play is LIVE! Party members standing in the same hunting zone now see each other in the scene in real time, nameplates and all — go hunt together
items.partyBuff: ⚔️ Hunt in the same zone as a friend for an EXP bonus + a share of each other's kill EXP, with denser mob spawns per member — or split up and farm freely, no penalty
items.partyChip: 📶 The party status chip now tells the truth: it only shows while actually pairing up or playing together — green "Playing with…" means you're in
items.connFix: 🔧 Fixed the first-live-test connection batch: joining a zone late made friends invisible, the "connecting…" label could stick forever, and the bot tried to equip wrong-class gear

items.freezeFix: 🧊➡️🏃 Major fix: joining a party froze everyone in place (walking/bot/warp all dead) — the game now runs the moment you meet a friend in a zone
items.smooth: ✨ Party play is far smoother: characters move as fluidly as solo (no more choppy 100ms steps) and every tap registers
items.names: 🏷️ Friends' real names now show over their heads and on the party strip (no more long ID strings)
items.povFx: 🎇 A friend's ultimate no longer hijacks your screen — darkening/shaking only for YOUR casts, while their effects still play in the world
items.party6: 👥 Parties now hold up to 6 players! Bring the whole crew

hof.title: Hall of Fame
hof.notOpenYet: The Hall of Fame isn't open yet

friends.title: Friends
friends.guestPitch: Friends need a registered account — sign up in Settings > My Account. Your current progress carries over, nothing is lost.
friends.autoAccepted: You're friends now! (they'd already sent you a request)
friends.multipleMatchesPrompt: Several characters share that name — pick the right one
friends.emptyFriends: No friends yet — try adding one above
friends.errorAccountRequired: You need a registered account to use friends
friends.errorSelf: You can't add yourself as a friend
friends.errorAlreadyPending: Request already sent — wait for a response
friends.errorTooManyPending: Too many pending requests — wait for one to be answered
friends.errorNotFriends: You need to be friends to send an emoji
friends.errorRateLimited: Sending too fast — slow down a bit
friends.partyPhaseNote: Party phase one: see each other status first — playing together for real is coming soon
friends.errorAlreadyInvited: Invite already sent — wait for a response
friends.errorAlreadyInParty: Leave your current party first to join a new one
friends.warpNoScrollHint: Buy a Warp Scroll from Auntie Pu
friends.warpNotClimbedHint: You haven't climbed to that zone yet
friends.sameZoneHint: Same zone — you can see each other now

questBoard.title: Quest Board
questBoard.dailyEmpty: No dailies today — check back tomorrow
questBoard.mainAllDone: You've finished every chapter! Thanks for the journey
questBoard.mainProgressElsewhere: Head to {map} to keep going on this chapter

chapter_map1.title: First Steps in the Human World
chapter_map1.desc: Explore the Human World, hunt your way through every zone, and beat the map's boss to move on

chapter_map2.title: Into the Demon Realm
chapter_map2.desc: Push through the Demon Realm to its boss room and defeat it to open the way to the Wild Frontier

chapter_map3.title: Claim the Wild Frontier
chapter_map3.desc: Fight through the Wild Frontier to its boss gate and finish the chapter

chapter_map4.title: Conquer the Frozen Tundra
chapter_map4.desc: Push into the Frozen Tundra all the way to its boss — watch out for the charge attack

chapter_map5.title: Cross the Desert Ruins
chapter_map5.desc: Fight through the Desert Ruins to its Pharaoh boss — watch for the summoned reinforcements

chapter_map6.title: Storm the Infernal City
chapter_map6.desc: Close out the journey in the Infernal City and defeat its warlord

daily_refine.title: Refine Once
daily_refine.desc: Refine at Uncle Dueng's station at least {count} time
